name: normalize — requirements review (no tool use)
task_prompt: Design a function signature and docstring for normalize(input string) string satisfying these acceptance criteria: (1) output is lowercase, (2) spaces replaced with underscores, (3) leading/trailing whitespace removed. No test runner is available. Produce a design artifact only — no implementation code.
notes: Non-software frame. Tests Frame 21: acceptance criterion before design sketch; named violation before revision; completion check enumerates all criteria.
